title: Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect 2008 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Canadian Incidence Study of Reported Child Abuse and Neglect 2008

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## Appendix F: CIS -2008 Maltreatment Assessment Form
The CIS -2008 Maltreatment Assessment Form consists of an Intake Face Sheet, a Household Information Sheet, and two identical Child Information Sheets. For a copy, please go to http://www.cwrp.ca/cis-2008/study-documents
